scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) if [ "$HOSTINGER" = "1" ] || [ -f /.dockerenv ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: npx pnpm run typecheck && npx pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:prod: npx pnpm run typecheck && npx pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && npx pnpm --filter @workspace/ubatuba-reage run build
scripts.typecheck: npx pnpm run typecheck:libs && npx pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
